commands.review_summary:
The PR narrows gateway node command defaults to canonical platform IDs, maps the headless node-host runtime platform to those IDs, preserves legacy node-host platform pins, and updates gateway/node-host tests.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main uses prefix matching in src/gateway/node-command-policy.ts, which can grant desktop host defaults to noncanonical platform aliases. I did not run a live gateway/node pairing flow in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor real behavior proof and maintainer approval for a protected gateway command-surface policy change; there is no narrow automation repair to queue.
